metadata.description: HumanLayer AI agent workflows — planning, research, implementation, debugging, and session handoff commands with specialized subagents

plugins.name: humanlayer-workflows
plugins.description: Complete AI agent workflow toolkit: implementation planning, codebase research, plan execution/validation, git commits, PR descriptions, debugging, session handoffs, and Linear ticket management. Includes 6 specialized subagents for code analysis, pattern finding, document research, and web search.
